description_long: This is a two-seater recliner upholstered in rich brown leather, featuring plush, overstuffed cushions for both the seat and backrest. The armrests are wide, rounded, and generously padded, seamlessly integrated into the overall form for maximum comfort. The stitching along the seams is visible, adding a subtle decorative touch and reinforcing the structure. The backrest is divided into two distinct, slightly contoured sections, each providing individual support. The base is low and solid, with small, unobtrusive feet that keep the recliner stable. The overall appearance is inviting and robust, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A brown leather two-seater recliner with plush cushions, wide padded armrests, and visible seam stitching. The design is robust and comfortable, with a divided backrest and a low, stable base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, rounded armrest and the depth of the plush seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, continuous back panel and the dual-sectioned backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion depth seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the two separate seat and back cushions, wide armrests, and inviting seating area.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rounded, and fully padded, covered in the same brown leather as the rest of the recliner, with visible seam stitching for added durability and style.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into two distinct, plush sections, each providing individual support for the seated occupants.
